message:
fix: Match rig add architecture to working gastown pattern

- Mayor is now a regular clone (doesn't need branch visibility)
- Refinery is a worktree on main (can see polecat branches, direct merge)
- This matches migrated gastown and satisfies doctor branch check

files.patch:
@@ -217,11 +217,11 @@ func runRigAdd(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
 	fmt.Printf("
Structure:
")
 	fmt.Printf("  %s/
", name)
 	fmt.Printf("  ├── config.json
")
-	fmt.Printf("  ├── .repo.git/        (shared bare repo)
")
+	fmt.Printf("  ├── .repo.git/        (shared bare repo for refinery+polecats)
")
 	fmt.Printf("  ├── .beads/           (prefix: %s)
", newRig.Config.Prefix)
 	fmt.Printf("  ├── plugins/          (rig-level plugins)
")
-	fmt.Printf("  ├── mayor/rig/        (worktree: main)
")
-	fmt.Printf("  ├── refinery/rig/     (worktree: refinery)
")
+	fmt.Printf("  ├── mayor/rig/        (clone: main)
")
+	fmt.Printf("  ├── refinery/rig/     (worktree: main, sees polecat branches)
")
 	fmt.Printf("  ├── crew/%s/        (your workspace)
", crewName)
 	fmt.Printf("  ├── witness/
")
 	fmt.Printf("  └── polecats/
")
